SIMULATION_OBJECTS.basket: This object appears to be a rectangular woven basket. The exterior is made of tightly interlaced light-colored fibers, giving it a textured, natural look. The basket has straight sides and slightly rounded corners. Inside, it is lined with a soft white fabric that folds gently over the top edges.
SIMULATION_OBJECTS.bbq_sauce: This is a dark brown plastic squeeze bottle, wider at the base and gradually tapering towards the top, fitted with a red flip-top lid. On the label, the letters 'BBQ' are printed in prominent, red uppercase letters right in the center, with the word 'Sauce' written below it in a yellow cursive font. Above 'BBQ', there is a line of smaller, slightly blurred text. The background of the top half of the label consists of alternating yellow and dark red vertical stripes, while the bottom half features a solid red background, ending with a white circle at the very bottom that contains a red five-pointed star.
SIMULATION_OBJECTS.butter: This object appears to be a rectangular box of butter. The packaging is brightly colored, mainly red,orange and yellow, with bold text that reads “FARM FRESH BUTTER.” The word “BUTTER” is printed along one side in large letters. There is an image of a cow against a blue and white background, suggesting a farm theme.
SIMULATION_OBJECTS.cream_cheese: The object appears to be a small, rectangular box in a shade of blue and white. It has a smooth, matte surface with printed graphics on the front. In the center, there is a darker blue oval-shaped design with white text inside it. The overall packaging looks compact and lightweight, possibly made of cardboard or thin paperboard. The design is simple and clean, with minimal colors—mainly different tones of blue and white.
SIMULATION_OBJECTS.ketchup: This object appears to be a plastic squeeze bottle of tomato ketchup. The bottle has a rounded, slightly tapered shape with a wider base and a narrower neck. It is primarily red or orange in color, matching the typical color of ketchup. The cap is light gray and sits on top of the bottle. On the front, there is an oval-shaped label with the words “Tomato Ketchup” printed prominently in the center, along with a brand name above it.
SIMULATION_OBJECTS.milk: This is a rectangular cardboard milk carton with a classic pitched roof design. The packaging features a color-blocked layout primarily in red, white, and light blue. The slanted top section has a red background with the words 'DAIRY FRESH' in small text above 'Milk' in large, bold white letters. The main front panel follows a similar layout at the top, featuring the same 'DAIRY FRESH' and a large 'Milk' printed on a red background. Below this, a swooping white section separates the red top from a light blue lower half. In this transition area, there is a red oval badge containing some blurred text. The bottom portion is decorated with an illustration of a black and white cow wearing a yellow bell, standing on a green grassy hill. At the very bottom edge, there is a dark green strip with small, illegible white text
SIMULATION_OBJECTS.orange_juice: This is a rectangular cardboard carton of orange juice with a classic pitched roof design. The packaging features a vibrant color palette of yellow, white, and orange. The slanted top section has a yellow background with a large orange circle containing the words 'ORANGE JUICE' in white text, with a small 'PURE' logo positioned just above it. The main front panel has a white and pale yellow background, displaying 'ORANGE JUICE' in large, dark, slightly stylized lettering. Below this text, the bottom half of the carton is decorated with a prominent illustration of a sliced orange half, which contains the words 'NO PULP' directly in its center.
SIMULATION_OBJECTS.new_salad_dressing: This object appears to be a plastic bottle of salad dressing. It has a rounded white body that tapers slightly toward the neck. The cap is dark green and cylindrical, matching the green accents on the label. On the front, there is an oval-shaped label with the words “Creamy Ranch Dressing” printed in the center. The label also features images of vegetables near the bottom.
SIMULATION_OBJECTS.tomato_sauce: This is a cylindrical metal can, likely containing food, featuring a metallic top with what appears to be a pull-tab on the edge. The can's label is divided into three distinct horizontal color bands. The top band is solid red, followed by a middle green band that contains some illegible, blurred yellow and white graphics on the right side. The bottom section has a light gray or white background decorated with two red, rounded shapes that closely resemble tomatoes.
SIMULATION_OBJECTS.porcelain_mug: This object appears to be a white ceramic mug. There is a curved handle attached to one side, designed for easy gripping.
SIMULATION_OBJECTS.alphabet_soup: This object is a small cylindrical metal can with a bright, colorful label. The upper part of the label is sky blue, featuring large, rounded yellow letters that spell part of the phrase “alphabet soup.” In the middle of the design, there is a white spoon illustration with light gray shading, placed diagonally across the label. The lower part of the label is bright orange, decorated with scattered alphabet letters in different colors, including yellow, green, red, and cream, giving it a playful and lively appearance. The can has a silver metallic rim at the top, and the label surface looks smooth and glossy, reflecting light slightly. On the side of the can, there is also a white “Nutrition Facts” table printed in black text on a white background.

SIMULATION_FIXTURES.wooden_cabinet: This is a three-tier black woven storage drawer unit.
SIMULATION_FIXTURES.wooden_tray: This is a rectangular, open-top wooden tray.
